title: Mutant
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:MutantRancor-TCG.jpg|thumb|right|250px|A mutant [[Rancor/Legends|rancor]]]]
A '''mutant''' was an individual, organism, or new genetic character arising or resulting from an instance of mutation, which is a sudden structural change within the DNA of a gene or chromosome of an organism resulting in the creation of a new character or trait not found in the parental type.

In some cases, mutants were created through [[Bioengineering/Legends|genetic engineering]], [[Radiation/Legends|radiation]] or the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side of the Force]], most notably [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] [[Sith alchemy/Legends|alchemy]] and [[Sith sorcery/Legends|magic]]. Subjects were often remade into mutants to be more brutal, more cunning, and, in some cases, more intelligent, such as [[Wilk (wolf)|Wilk]], a [[Wolf/Legends|wolf]] from the [[Endor/Legends|forest moon of Endor]] who was able to understand and speak [[Galactic Basic Standard]].<ref name="Mutants">{{GraalCite|23|dossier BXLH: Les mutants dans Star Wars}}</ref> In other cases, individuals of a wide range of species were born mutants most notably [[Triclops]]<ref name="Glove of Darth Vader">''[[The Glove of Darth Vader]]''</ref> and the [[Keeramak]].<ref name="Force Heretic II">''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic II: Refugee]]''</ref>

==List of [[Sith/Legends|Sith]]/[[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] [[Sithspawn/Legends|mutants]] and their creators==
[[File:Gorc-JKconcept.jpg|thumb|right|200px|[[Gorc]], a mutant [[Gamorrean/Legends|Gamorrean]]]]
*[[Battle hydra/Legends|Battle hydra]] – [[Exar Kun/Legends|Exar Kun]]
*[[Behemoth from the World Below]] – [[Seviss Vaa]], [[New Sith]]
*[[Chrysalide]] [[Rancor/Legends|rancors]] – Reborn [[Palpatine/Legends|Emperor Palpatine]]
*[[Gorc]] – [[Blackhole]]
*[[Imperial Sentinel]]s – Reborn Emperor Palpatine
*[[Leviathan (creature)|Leviathans]] – Dark Jedi during the [[Hundred-Year Darkness/Legends|Hundred-Year Darkness]]
*[[Maraki]] – [[Kyrisa]]
*[[Massassi/Legends|Massassi]] – [[Sith Empire/Legends|Old Sith Empire]]
*[[Night Beast]] – Exar Kun
*[[Picaroon C. Boodle]] – [[Cronal|Blackhole]]
*[[Rakghoul]] – [[Karness Muur]]/[[Muur Talisman]]
*[[Sea Leviathan]] - [[Vul Isen]]
*[[Sith war behemoth]] – Old Sith Empire
*[[Sith warbird]] – Old Sith Empire
*[[Sith war rhino]] – Old Sith Empire
*[[Sith war worm]] – Old Sith Empire
*[[Storm beast]] – [[Darth Revan's Sith Empire]]?
*[[Taanab mutant rancor]] – [[Disciples of Ragnos]]
*[[Technobeast]] – [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord]] [[Belia Darzu]]
*[[Terentatek/Legends|Terentatek]] – Exar Kun
*[[Triclops]] – [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]]
*[[Unkajo/Legends|Unkajo]] – Kyrisa
